Article: Translation for the full OP captions
[]: Translation for the full OP captions?             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun May 29, 2011 12:43 am There's a page in the old commentary about the Full OP but it's only about the Reiquarium scenes that have been putted in that video. Currently I'm working on subbing the "01 Test Type" DVD (more or less for the heck of it) and I was wondering if anyone could check the translations that a friend has found (it looks like it's a rough translation): [code:1]1. 召還された少年 The boy, who returned home 2. 追憶の少女 The remembered girl 3. 懐抱される心 A feeling heart [?] 4. 生還した少女 The girl, who returned alive 5. 何故の涙 Why tears? 6. カイトウ無き父子 Estranged father and son [?] 7. 愛憎の継続 Continuation of liking and disliking 8. 常識の逸脱 Omission of common sense 9. 頽れた神々 Relying on the gods [?] 10. 発掘された巨人 Discovery of a giant 11. 歪んだ地軸 Crooked earth axis 12. 解放された禁忌 The broken taboo 13. 封印された儀式 Ceremony of sealing 14. 超法規的特務機開 Chance for the autonomous special agency [?] 15. 迎撃防衛要塞都市 Ambush defense stronghold town 16. 選ばれし少女 Elite girl 17. 崩壊する自我 Deflating ego 18. 予言遂行の秘密結社 The secret society, which executes the prophecy 19. 消され逝く探索者 Lethal investigation [?] 20. 病んでゆく心 A dying heart [?] 21. 三人日のワタシ Me as a part of the three [?] 22. 適格者となりし友 The qualifying friend 23. 仕

Article: Translation for the full OP captions
く心 A dying heart [?] 21. 三人日のワタシ Me as a part of the three [?] 22. 適格者となりし友 The qualifying friend 23. 仕組まれた少年 The boy, who has been used [?] 24. 心の壁 Wall of the heart 25. 裏切りの微笑み Smile of betrayal 26. 投入される殺人部隊 Creation of a killer unit/troup [?] 27. 酬いの降臨 Descent of the repaying gods [?] 28. 儀式の依代 Ceremony of the medium (yorishiro) 29. 女としての母親 Mother as a woman 29b. Denied [on Ritsuko's data device] 30. 帰依に架ける愛 Love, which is given with devotion 31. 無への回帰 Revolution towards nothing 32. 再生への願望 Wish for rebirth[/code:1] I'd be grateful if anyone could help me.
